# Issue bodies (12-issue backlog)

Templates for the **12 open issues** on GitHub. Filename = issue number.

| # | Title |
|---|-------|
| 11 | Wallet signature auth — production QA |
| 15 | Production MySQL + DATABASE_URL |
| 16 | Deploy score-registry to testnet |
| 17 | Trustless Work integration |
| 18 | Blend Protocol integration |
| 20 | Vercel Git auto-deploy |
| 22 | Landing CTA URL sync |
| 28 | Score Gatekeeper PoC |
| 36 | Playwright E2E auth tests |
| 40 | Dapp i18n (ES/EN) |
| 52 | Accessibility WCAG audit |
| 59 | Credit event dispute flow |

Update an issue body on GitHub:

```bash
gh issue edit 15 --body-file .github/issue-bodies/15.md
```
